---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a gameplay, UX, content, or technical improvement
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Or Opportunity

What problem does this request solve, or what opportunity does it unlock?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you want to see.

## Player Or Developer Impact

Explain who benefits and how.

## Possible Implementation Notes

List any relevant scenes, components, assets, or systems.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, references, videos, or links if useful.
